since_last: 55% of 89 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +5.21%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 55% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.06% · BTC +0.30% · Gold +1.51% · Nasdaq100 -0.82%. 55% of 89 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +5.21%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +5.21%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -4.11%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: TER is the standout at -8.75%
cards.body: Leaders: NOW +8.65%, APP +8.12%, PUBM +7.47%, WDAY +6.94%, DV +6.68%. Laggards: TER -8.75%, NXPI -6.81%, HPE -6.34%, VRT -6.34%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.09% at $153.13
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.09% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
